title: Outlook Sync Elements with link
excerpt: For the sync of elements to Outlook, it would be great if the calendar entry referred to the element with a link. At the moment I have to search for the item manually.

posts.author: dominik.hagenbucher (Dominik Hagenbucher)
posts.cookedHtml: For the sync of elements to Outlook, it would be great if the calendar entry referred to the element with a link. At the moment I have to search for the item manually.
